wifis3_begin_open.tooltip: Connect to open WiFi network without password

wifis3_begin_ap.message0: Start WiFi AP SSID %1 Password %2 Channel %3

wifis3_is_connected.tooltip: Check if connected to WiFi network

wifis3_local_ip.tooltip: Return the local IP address of the device

wifis3_mac_address.tooltip: Return the MAC address of the WiFi module

wifis3_set_dns.tooltip: Set primary and secondary DNS servers

wifis3_config_ip.message0: Configure static IP Address %1 Gateway %2 Subnet %3
wifis3_config_ip.tooltip: Configure device static IP address, gateway and subnet mask

wifis3_ssid_by_index.tooltip: Return the SSID of the network at specified index

wifis3_rssi_by_index.tooltip: Return the RSSI signal strength (dBm) of the network at specified index

wifis3_scanned_networks_count.tooltip: Return the number of WiFi networks found in last scan

wifis3_ping.tooltip: Ping the specified host, return response time

wifis3_firmware_version.tooltip: Return the firmware version of the WiFi module

wifis3_wait_for_connection.message0: Wait for WiFi connection Timeout %1 ms
wifis3_wait_for_connection.tooltip: Wait until WiFi connection succeeds or timeout
